footer.tagline: A Malaysian project consultancy and venture builder — developing people-first ventures from concept to nationwide scale.
footer.owner: NNF Global is the parent and exclusive promoter of Hentian Bas Mesra Rakyat and Saté Ria.

hero.title: Building Malaysia's people-first ventures.
hero.sub: NNF Global develops, structures, and promotes high-impact ventures — from public infrastructure to iconic food brands — and carries them from concept to nationwide scale.

what.title: One group, end-to-end venture delivery
what.c1Body: We structure, finance, and manage complex projects — including public infrastructure delivered through Private Finance Initiative models.
what.c2Body: End-to-end organisation, promotion, and management of events and sporting programmes, indoors and out, for professional and public audiences.
what.c3Body: From central-kitchen manufacturing to fast-food, kiosks, and mobile formats — we build and promote scalable F&B brands.

ventures.title: Two ventures, one standard of delivery
ventures.hbBody: World-class, people-friendly bus terminals built through a Private Finance Initiative — air-conditioned, safe, and full of amenities for the rakyat.
ventures.srBody: Malaysia's iconic satay brand, reborn for 2025–2028 on a central-kitchen model, a versatile licensing format, and global ambition.

cta.title: Partner with NNF Global
cta.body: For project partnerships, investment, government collaboration, or venture licensing — we'd like to hear from you.

about.title: A Malaysian venture builder with a public-good mandate
about.leadP: NNF Global is a Malaysian project consultancy and venture builder based in Semenyih, Selangor. We originate, structure, finance, and promote ventures that combine commercial strength with tangible public benefit.
about.b1: Parent and exclusive promoter of Hentian Bas Mesra Rakyat and Saté Ria
about.b2: Project structuring including Private Finance Initiative models
about.b3: Experience engaging government ministries and local councils nationwide

cap.title: What our registration covers
cap.c1Body: Advisory, structuring, and management for projects outside architecture, engineering, and management consulting.
cap.c2Body: Organising, promoting, and managing events and live productions of every scale.
cap.c3Body: Organisation, operation, and promotion of indoor and outdoor sporting events for professionals and amateurs.
cap.c4Body: Manufacture of prepared meals and dishes, and wholesale of foodstuffs at scale.
cap.c5Body: Fast-food restaurants, kiosks, mobile food carts, and hawker formats.
cap.c6Body: Retail sale of any kind of product over the internet.

reg.title: Registered & ready to deliver
reg.body: NNF Global is registered with the Companies Commission of Malaysia (SSM) as a sole proprietorship, with a five-year registration period from 2026.

proj.title: Two ventures under one group
proj.body: NNF Global is the parent and exclusive promoter of an infrastructure venture and an iconic food brand — each delivered to the same standard.

hb.title: Hentian Bas Mesra Rakyat
hb.body: World-class, "people-friendly" bus terminals built through a Private Finance Initiative — turning bleak, unsafe roadside stops into safe, comfortable, amenity-rich public spaces for the rakyat.
hb.f1: Air-conditioned waiting halls with ergonomic seating
hb.f2: CCTV, security, and bright, safe surroundings
hb.f3: Convenience stores, fast food, café, ATM, modern toilets & surau
hb.f4: Self-funding via digital billboards & cellular antennas
hb.note: Prepared for the Ministry of Housing and Local Government, the programme has engaged local councils (PBT) across Selangor, Penang, Johor, Kedah, Negeri Sembilan, Melaka, Terengganu, Sarawak, and Sabah.

sr.title: Saté Ria
sr.body: Malaysia's iconic satay brand, reborn. NNF Global promotes the brand's revival, built on a central kitchen for consistent quality, a versatile licensing model, and a global identity.
sr.f1: Central-kitchen production for consistent, frozen-ready satay
sr.f2: Food truck, kiosk, and full-outlet licensing formats
sr.f3: Owned brand and secret recipe, built for global markets

contact.title: Let's build something that lasts
contact.body: Reach out about project partnerships, investment, government collaboration, or venture enquiries. We respond to every serious enquiry.
contact.addr: 5-06 Residensi Sri Tanjung, Jalan Sri Tanjung 17, Taman Sri Tanjung, 43500 Semenyih, Selangor
contact.routeBody: Pick the enquiry that fits and we'll route it to the right person.
contact.reg: NNF Global · SSM Reg. No. 202603031145 (TR0336679-K) · Registered in Malaysia.
